hero.title: Technical Consulting & Training
hero.subtitle: Empower your team for the future
hero.description: End-to-end advisory and structured training to elevate skills and accelerate delivery.

overview.title: What We Offer
overview.p1: Senior experts provide full-stack advisory from technology selection and architecture design to implementation, plus structured training to help teams master new technologies fast.
overview.p2: Covers cloud, big data, AI, microservices, and DevOps. Hybrid online/offline delivery with hands-on focus. Custom corporate training and public classes available.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting
consulting.intro: Pragmatic guidance for sound decisions and successful delivery.

cert.title: Certification Prep
cert.intro: Training and bootcamps for major vendor certifications.

items.desc: AWS / Azure / Alibaba Cloud and cloud-native architecture.

items.desc: ML, DL, NLP, CV and real-world applications.

items.title: Big Data
items.desc: Hadoop, Spark, Flink for large-scale data processing.

items.title: Microservices
items.desc: Spring Cloud, Kubernetes, service mesh, and observability.

items.title: DevOps
items.desc: CI/CD, automation, ops, monitoring & alerting, engineering velocity.

items.title: Programming Languages
items.desc: Python, Java, Go, JavaScript in production.

cards.title: Public Classes
